_protocol.read_forward: Load this file at every research-session start. Seed the literature search from confirmed entries before querying WebSearch. Never re-derive a citation already confirmed here.
_protocol.write_forward: After any new citation survives fan-out adversarial verify (K=2 probes agree), append an entry here immediately -- do NOT wait until session end.
_protocol.fields: key (slug), title, url, year, finding_1line (<=120 chars), applies_to (list of project concerns)

confirmed.title: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models (DreamerV3)
confirmed.finding_1line: RSSM + TwoHot symlog targets + KL-balancing = stable world-model training across 7 domains with no hyperparameter tuning.

confirmed.title: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces
confirmed.finding_1line: Selective SSM with input-dependent transitions; linear complexity, strong on long sequences; outperforms Transformers at sub-1B scale on language.

confirmed.title: A Time Series is Worth 64 Words: Long-term Forecasting with Transformers (PatchTST)
confirmed.finding_1line: Patch tokenization + channel-independence beats full-series attention for multi-horizon TS forecasting; reduces complexity O(L^2)->O((L/P)^2).

confirmed.title: MOMENT: A Family of Open Time-series Foundation Models
confirmed.finding_1line: Masked-patch pre-training on 1B TS tokens yields zero-shot transfer; MOMENT validated as descriptive foundation model for narration in this project.

confirmed.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
confirmed.finding_1line: Post-failure verbal post-mortems stored in episodic memory; retry conditioned on prior failure trace; dramatically reduces repeated mistakes in multi-turn agent loops.

confirmed.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
confirmed.finding_1line: Skill library of reusable executable programs + automatic curriculum + GPT-4 verifier; monotonically expanding capability without catastrophic forgetting.
